evidence_summary: Establish the scale of the atmosphere-generating machinery and introduce the antagonist through a deceptive hospitality arc. The tension must pivot from industrial awe to psychological dread as telepathic realization occurs.

Carter enters the factory and is hosted by an elderly man. While the host appears hospitable, Carter uses his telepathy to realize the man intends to kill him to protect the secrets of the atmosphere-generating machinery.
john_carter enters the vast, humming interior of the factory.

A deceptive social exchange masking a murderous intent.
